summary: Data engineer with 9 years of experience designing large-scale ETL pipelines, real-time streaming architectures, and cloud-native data platforms. Led the migration of a 40TB analytics warehouse from on-premise Hadoop to Snowflake, reducing query latency by 70%. Passionate about data quality, observability, and building systems that empower analysts to move faster.

experience_items.description: Architected a real-time patient data integration platform processing 2.8M events daily using Apache Kafka and dbt. Built data contracts and quality gates that reduced downstream reporting errors by 45%. Mentored a team of four junior engineers through weekly design reviews.

Designed and maintained 120+ Airflow DAGs orchestrating data flows across S3, Redshift, and Looker. Led the migration from Redshift to Snowflake, re-engineering transformation layers and cutting monthly compute costs by 35%. Introduced Great Expectations for automated data validation across 80 critical tables.

Built Python-based ETL pipelines ingesting market data from Bloomberg and Reuters feeds. Developed reconciliation scripts that identified $1.2M in reporting discrepancies within the first quarter. Maintained PostgreSQL and MongoDB clusters handling 500GB of daily transaction data.

education_items.honors: Graduate Research Award for thesis on fault-tolerant stream processing
First Class with Distinction, Department Rank 4

skills.skill_list: Apache Kafka, Apache Spark, Apache Airflow, dbt, Fivetran, Great Expectations, Delta Lake
AWS (S3, Glue, Lambda, Redshift), Snowflake, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes

certifications: AWS Certified Data Analytics – Specialty (2024) · Snowflake SnowPro Core (2023) · Databricks Certified Associate Developer for Apache Spark (2021)
